zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Rieux於大約1045年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特時，她的父親Guéhenoc de Rieux12歲，母親Amaurie de Estouteville32歲。她和Robert d'Estouteville至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1099年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁斯吉維茲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rieux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (southern): topographic name for someone who lived by a stream, from Occitan rieu ‘stream’ (from Latin rivus); or a habitational name from Rieu(x), the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Durieux .
Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of Spanish Riado, at least as an intermediate form of Reaux 2.

variants.name: Durieux
meanings: French and Walloon: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, from regional French rieu ‘stream’ (from Latin rivus); or a habitational name for someone from Le Rieu(x), the name of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia), named with this word. Compare Dury and Rieux .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Rieux was born about 1045, in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Guéhenoc de Rieux, was 12 and her mother, Amaurie de Estouteville, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Robert d'Estouteville. She died after 1099, in Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni

historicEvents.description: Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Rieux est née environ 1045, à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guéhenoc de Rieux, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Amaurie d’Estouteville, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Robert d'Estouteville. Elle est décédée après 1099, à Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Rieux um 1045 in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guéhenoc de Rieux 12 und ihre Mutter Amaurie de Estouteville 32. Sie hatte mit Robert d'Estouteville mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1099 in Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Robert d'Estouteville. Morì dopo il 1099, nel Skipwith, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Rieuxが約1045年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントで生まれた時，父Guéhenoc de Rieuxは12歳，母Amaurie de Estoutevilleは32歳であった。彼女はRobert d'Estoutevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1099年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングスキプウィスで死去した。

ko.Skipwith, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Rieux(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guéhenoc de Rieux(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amaurie de Estouteville(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Robert d'Estouteville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 스키p위스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Rieux родилась около 1045 г. в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guéhenoc de Rieux было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Amaurie de Estouteville, 32.
